title: Homocysteine and Progression of Atherosclerosis
text:
Summary: In the first phase, to establish the relationship of progression of peripheral vascular disease (PVD) to plasma homocysteine. In the second phase, to conduct a randomized, controlled trial of folic acid treatment of plasma homocysteine in peripheral vascular disease.
Inclusion criteria: No eligibility criteria
Exclusion criteria:

metadata.diseases: ['Cardiovascular Diseases', 'Peripheral Vascular Diseases', 'Atherosclerosis', 'Cerebrovascular Disorders', 'Myocardial Infarction', 'Heart Diseases', 'Hyperhomocysteinemia']
